# Future Homes International

> International real estate agency offering premium properties, investment guidance, and citizenship-by-investment programs across Turkey, Dubai, Cyprus, and Bali.

Future Homes International helps overseas buyers find apartments, villas, and off-plan developments in Turkey (Antalya, Istanbul, Mersin), the UAE (Dubai), Cyprus, and Indonesia (Bali). The site lists active properties, regional guides, legal/tax information, and the Turkish Citizenship by Investment program.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Future Homes International and featured destinations.
- [About Us](/about-us): Company background, founders, and offices.
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Sales contacts and office addresses.
- [Information Center](/information): Articles on buying, legal, tax, lifestyle, and investment.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client reviews and case studies.
- [Property Wizard](/property-wizard): Guided matchmaking to suitable properties.
- [AI Property Search](/ai-property-search): Natural-language property search.
- [Map Search](/map-search): Browse properties on an interactive map.

## Destinations

- [Antalya, Turkey](/antalya): Properties on the Turkish Riviera.
- [Istanbul, Turkey](/istanbul): Apartments and investment opportunities in Istanbul.
- [Mersin, Turkey](/mersin): Coastal Mediterranean properties.
- [Dubai, UAE](/dubai): Luxury apartments, villas, and off-plan projects.
- [Cyprus](/cyprus): EU residency and Mediterranean homes.
- [Bali, Indonesia](/bali): Villas and rental-yield investments.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
